headline: The $42 Trillion Oil Opportunity Hiding in Plain Sight
summary: A new oil boom may not come from new discoveries. Advanced recovery technology could unlock hundreds of billions of barrels already trapped in existing fields

headline: Jim Cramer Recommends EQT and Devon Over Transocean
summary: Transocean Ltd. (NYSE:RIG) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. When a caller asked if they should “add more” RIG shares, Cramer stated: No, no, no. I’ll tell you, I do like EQT here very much, natural gas, and the Devon story actually makes […]

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Halliburton, TechnipFMC and Weatherford International
summary: HAL, FTI and WFRD are highlighted as oilfield services stocks positioned to navigate weaker industry conditions and energy-transition challenges.
